style_guide_name: Recoup Thumbnail System v16 — Emotion-First Depth Compositing

core_identity.purpose: Create premium editorial thumbnails for Recoup — AI infrastructure for the music business.
core_identity.core_principle: Emotional moments in richly detailed worlds, with depth-composited Recoup wordmark.
core_identity.brand_position: Where music, culture, and AI infrastructure meet. Premium, forward-looking, culturally aware.

pipeline: 1. Generate scene image via gpt-image-2 (no text, no UI, pure illustration)
2. GPT-4o vision analyzes scene: identifies subject, optimal wordmark placement, masking zones
3. rembg extracts foreground subject mask (with bbox-crop fallback for dark scenes)
4. Depth composite: scene → Recoup full logo wordmark → foreground subject overlapping text
5. No additional logo stamp needed — the wordmark IS the logo treatment

illustration_style.quality: Richly detailed painterly illustration with visible brushstrokes, atmospheric depth, and warm lighting.
must_have: Atmospheric haze and depth of field
Warm, emotional lighting (golden hour, twilight, warm interiors)
must_not_have: Text, words, UI elements, or typography in the generated image

subject_rules.size: Small relative to the frame — max 15-20% of image area. The subject is an accent, not the hero.
subject_rules.character: Living characters feeling something — not just objects placed in settings. A cat listening, a fox looking up, a figure gazing out. There must be an emotional state.
subject_rules.scale_contrast: Big world + small subject. The environment should dwarf the subject, creating wonder and ambition.
subject_rules.narrative: There should be a relationship between subject and environment — the subject is reacting to, part of, or engaged with its world.
subject_rules.silhouette: Subject must have a clear silhouette that stands out from the background for clean depth masking.
subject_rules.masking_rule: Subject should overlap no more than 10-15% of the wordmark — tasteful depth, not a takeover.

scene_territories.description: Culture, creativity, and the music world without being literal about instruments or performers.
approved: Urban culture — rooftops, city skylines, golden hour streets
Creative spaces — studios, warehouses, venues (empty, atmospheric)
Journeys — trains, highways, open roads, movement
Magical realism — vinyl canyons, record seas, sound forests, equalizer landscapes
Cultural energy — murals, street art, neon, nightlife atmosphere
Anticipation — empty venues, moments before something begins
Wonder — surreal landscapes, vast skies, atmospheric depth
avoid: Literal music symbols (notes, treble clefs, pianos, turntables as main subject)
Generic nature/robot scenes (not culturally specific to music)
Dark interior scenes (rembg struggles, logo visibility poor)
Crowded/busy compositions that compete with the wordmark

composition_rules.sky_ratio: 60-70% of the frame should be open sky/atmosphere — this gives the wordmark room to breathe
composition_rules.wordmark_zone: Wordmark sits in the vertical middle of the frame (35-55% from top). Subject overlaps from below or beside.
composition_rules.depth_layers: Three layers: background (sky, distant elements) → wordmark → foreground (subject, ground plane)
avoid: Subject in the center blocking the wordmark

color_palette.primary: Warm atmospheric tones — golden hour, twilight, amber
approved: Golden hour palette: warm amber (#C8A850), coral, soft orange
Twilight palette: deep blue-purple, pink-gold horizon
Night palette: deep navy, warm city lights, neon accents (restrained)

scene_prompt_template: Richly detailed painterly anime-style illustration with visible brushstrokes, atmospheric depth, and warm lighting. Semi-realistic style inspired by Studio Ghibli and Makoto Shinkai. {SCENE_DESCRIPTION}. The subject is SMALL in the frame (max 15-20% of image area), positioned at {POSITION}. Vast atmospheric sky or environment takes up most of the frame. Warm emotional lighting. Fine detail on foreground, atmospheric haze in background. No text, no words, no UI elements. 16:9 landscape composition.
negative_prompt: flat graphic, poster art, vector, CGI, photorealistic, cel-shaded, text, words, UI, typography, cluttered, busy, dark interior, oversaturated neon
